targets.queryText:
WITH s AS (
  SELECT host, channel,
         SUM((julianday(COALESCE(ended_at, datetime('now'))) - julianday(started_at)) * 24) AS hours
  FROM sessions GROUP BY host, channel
),
d AS (
  SELECT host, channel, COUNT(*) AS detections, MAX(ts) AS last_radar
  FROM events WHERE kind='radar' AND channel IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY host, channel
)
SELECT s.host, s.channel,
       ROUND(s.hours, 2)                            AS active_hours,
       COALESCE(d.detections, 0)                    AS detections,
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(d.detections,0)=0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ROUND(s.hours / d.detections, 2) END AS mtbd_hours,
       d.last_radar
FROM s LEFT JOIN d ON s.host=d.host AND s.channel=d.channel
ORDER BY s.host, s.channel;
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%d', ts) AS time, channel, COUNT(*) AS detections FROM events WHERE kind='radar' AND channel IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;
